title: echium cantabricum
intro: Echium cantabricum, also known as the Spanish bugloss, is a perennial plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Echium cantabricum include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reducing congestion and inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for a gentle and natural approach to alleviating respiratory discomfort.
